title: Hauled out in Krabi
summary: Well I can’t stay here for ever and so I head back to Thailand, going to Krabi as the haul out is much cheaper than Phuket. I don’t really need to haul out yet but it is a convenient time to do it. They are dredging the marina but hit a snag as the overground exhaust pipe wont take the pressure. In the meantime my little Thai contractor is driving me nuts.…
content:
Well I can’t stay here for ever and so I head back to Thailand, going to Krabi as the haul out is much cheaper than Phuket.  I don’t really need to haul out yet but it is a convenient time to do it.  They are dredging the marina but hit a snag as the overground exhaust pipe wont take the pressure.

In the meantime my little Thai contractor is driving me nuts.  Her own work is excellent but communication is difficult as she refuses to learn English (all of her customers speak English), she does not explain jobs properly to her staff and she does not supervise them.  I sack one, keep one but she is under my direction, not the contractor’s.  And still she ends up in the wrong place doing the wrong job.

If you read about me going to prison it is because I have killed them all…
